metadata.description: The PYRE marketplace — the agent skill for building Python apps on the Internet Computer.

plugins.name: pyre-icp
plugins.description: Build, run, and deploy PYRE apps — Flask-flavored Python backends on the Internet Computer (ICP), via Kybra (RustPython → WASM). Bundles the operational skill: canister project shape, the golden rules, Kybra build traps, and the capability quick-reference.
